gene_description: Solute Carrier Family 22 Member 2 — encodes Organic Cation Transporter 2 (OCT2), the primary renal secretory transporter responsible for metformin elimination from circulation

source.title: Interaction of rs316019 variants of SLC22A2 with metformin and other drugs: an in silico analysis
source.finding: The SLC22A2 rs316019 (270A>S) variant reduces OCT2 renal clearance of metformin, increasing systemic accumulation and risk of metformin-associated lactic acidosis (MALA) — a potentially life-threatening condition with 30-50% mortality rate.

AA.effect: Wild-type 270A form with normal OCT2 function and optimal renal metformin clearance. Rapid elimination from circulation with reduced accumulation risk.
AA.recommendation: Standard metformin dosing. Good renal elimination expected. Monitor renal function periodically, especially in elderly or those with declining eGFR.

AT.effect: Heterozygous carriers show intermediate renal OCT2 activity. Modest reduction in metformin renal clearance (approximately 31-44% lower) with some accumulation in plasma.
AT.recommendation: Standard metformin dosing typically appropriate, though careful renal function monitoring recommended. Be especially vigilant if eGFR declines. Consider dose reduction if baseline renal function marginal.

TA.effect: Heterozygous carriers show intermediate renal OCT2 activity. Modest reduction in metformin renal clearance (approximately 31-44% lower) with some accumulation in plasma.
TA.recommendation: Standard metformin dosing typically appropriate, though careful renal function monitoring recommended. Be especially vigilant if eGFR declines. Consider dose reduction if baseline renal function marginal.

TT.effect: Homozygous 270S form has severely reduced OCT2 function for metformin renal secretion. Marked accumulation in plasma (46-74% higher AUC) with significantly delayed elimination (CLrenal reduced 31-44%). High risk for metformin-associated lactic acidosis, especially if combined with renal impairment or acute illness.
TT.recommendation: Caution with metformin use. Careful dose adjustment or alternative agent consideration strongly advised. Mandatory regular renal function monitoring (eGFR, creatinine). Avoid if eGFR <45 mL/min/1.73m2. Periodic lactate and pH monitoring recommended. Absolute contraindication if eGFR <30 or severe renal disease.
